title: anodiscus xanthophyllus
intro: Anodiscus xanthophyllus, also known as yellow anodiscus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Anodiscus xanthophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Anodiscus xanthophyllus is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in tinctures and capsules for its medicinal properties.
